summary: Gmail dark theme, calendar sync button, distinct mail and chat badges, and logo-aligned website.

introduced: Calendar Sync button pulls Google Calendar events and refreshes meeting alerts on demand
Toolbar and sidebar show separate blue mail and green chat unread badges with counts side by side
changed: App UI blends with Gmail dark theme across sidebar, tabs, toolbars, and embedded web views
Inbox opens Gmail directly when signed in — no brief login screen flash
Website theme updated to match the Nucleus app icon navy and periwinkle palette
